title: Ghost of Tsushima DIRECTOR'S CUT

notes: At the current moment, I cannot find a set of ingame options and launch options which can get this game to run consistently, let alone run past the initial cutscene. I've tried a few versions of Proton, a handful of the recommended launch options, and disabling nealy every graphics option without any luck. Most of the people here who can get it to run have AMD GPUs which do not have this issue. It seems either Nvidia needs to fix the driver or (more likely) the Proton dev team need to make a change to the next version of Proton for this to be able to function. As it is now, it is unplayable.
